name: async-pr-review
description: Trigger this skill when the user wants to start an asynchronous PR review, run background checks on a PR, or check the status of a previously started async PR review.
intent_triggers: use the async pr review agent skill
run a workflow for async pr review
help me with async pr review
我需要處理 async pr review 相關工作
幫我啟用 async pr review 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 async pr review
use async pr review from gemini-cli

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the async pr review skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
